TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Sandimen, title = Sandimen, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sandimen} }

S.FORM: Sandimen Sandimen a sakuwan ku Pingtung. kumud nu kalesakan, 185.9 km¬≤. (kalesakan nu linpanti 94.02 km¬≤, kalesakan nu pawliwti 85.25 km¬≤), u kasabinawlan, 7,698 ku tademaw. u kasalumaluma' sa, 2,296 ku luma'. ilabu nu kasaniyazu' nu siyang sa, 7,320 ku ingcumin a tademaw. u kasabinawlan, Pakalatu 95%(Paiwan, Rukai) ku kasabinawlan. u Paiwan atu Rukai ku sakalaniyazu'. nikasakuwakuwan Sandimen mala 10 a cuwen atu 12 ku niyazu'. kina 12 a niyazu'sa, Timur , Tjavatjavang , Valjulu , Paridrayan , Sagaran , Talamakau , Cavak , Djineljepan , Tjailjaking , Kingdalruwane , Tjukuvulj , Tjusepayuan . Sandimen (Paiwan a binacadan a kamu, Timur)i tini i Taywan nuwamisan nu Ping-tung-siang, nuwamisan nu Kaw-sing-se Maw-lin-cuy, Liw-kuay-cuy, nuwalian macapi i Wu-tay-siang, satip macapi u Kaw-su-siang, Yan-pu-siang, nutimulan macapi i Ne-pu-siang, Ma-ciy-siang. u ahebal ku lala' makala tu 196 ping-bang-kung-li, nipasilut tu ngangan i Ping-tung-siang u sakatulu nu tabakiay, uyni dada'Se-ce-siang, U'-tay-siang, u tademaw pakala' tu 7.7 malebut a tademaw, u kakatuuday nu Ping-tung-siang a tademaw nu binacadan a niyazu'. Sandimen (śéíÁĀ£Ť™ě:Timur) . Sandimen (Paiwan a binacadan a kamu, Timur)i tini i Taywan nuwamisan nu Ping-tung-siang, nuwamisan nu Kaw-sing-se Maw-lin-cuy, Liw-kuay-cuy, nuwalian macapi i Wu-tay-siang, satip macapi u Kaw-su-siang, Yan-pu-siang, nutimulan macapi i Ne-pu-siang, Ma-ciy-siang. u ahebal ku lala' makala tu 196 ping-bang-kung-li, nipasilut tu ngangan i Ping-tung-siang u sakatulu nu tabakiay, uyni dada'Se-ce-siang, U'-tay-siang, u tademaw pakala' tu 7.7 malebut a tademaw, u kakatuuday nu Ping-tung-siang a tademaw nu binacadan a niyazu'. Sandimen mala 10 a cuwen atu 12 ku niyazu'. kina 12 a niyazu'sa, Timur , Tjavatjavang , Valjulu , Paridrayan , Sagaran , Talamakau , Cavak , Djineljepan , Tjailjaking , Kingdalruwane , Tjukuvulj , Tjusepayuan . uynian a buyu'a lala' atu enal u kalalikeluhan a kakitizaan, kayadahay ku masaungcuyungcuyay a buyu',hay-pa i 100 katukuh i 2,159 depah, izaw ku Ay-liaw a sauwactalabi i niyazu', śĶĀÁ∂ďťĄČŚĘÉdemiad tungusay u ze-day-ci-bung a demiad, aenengan a binawlan u Paiwan a binacadan u kahenulan,u zumaay a Paiwan a binacadan, mahiza u Sin-ye a niyazu', ayzaay a mihcaan pakala tu sakapahay aidangan a kakitizaan, patayza i Maw-lin a kanatalay a idangan. Laylay Sandimen ,śļźŤá™śéíÁĀ£Ť™ě"timur", (Suann-tńď-mnŐāg).1935ŚĻī,śó•śú¨ŚįáśéíÁĀ£śóŹTimur,Talavatsal,Salalau ". Sandimen , lalengawan/lalekalan namakayni i Paiwan a kamu,"timur" malinat tayni miatang ku layakay nu tayniay a Hulan nu lalayay tunisasengiay a ngiha' kyu palu nu buyu'ay a kiwmah a banuh tu San-ti-men, nu ayaza i Taywan layakay a kamu masakamu tu San-ti-men "Suann-tńď-mnŐāg" 1935 a mihca i kaLipunan u Paywan a binacadan tu Timur, Talavatsal, Salalau tuluay nu kenis a tademaw malimat hay nikatukuh ayza nu Sandimen a kenis, nisasulitaan sakaysasangaan tu kalcalaecay nuzazan a kasaupuaan nu niyazu'ay, nanutawya nu Takaw a kenis atu Pingtungay a kenis nipikuwan, panganga han sa "„āĶ„É≥„ÉÜ„ā£„ÉĘ„É≥". nazikuzan nu Kang-hu tu sayaway misumad tu Ta-kawan a kenis nu Sandimen a nikasu u ouwan malecabay a kenis, 1947 amihcaan masumat u Sandimen a kenis, 1950 a mihcaan masumat aca tu baluhayay nu Ping-tung a kenis, 1992 a mihcaan waluay a bulad hanika ayza kinangangan. mikawaway tu kawaw nu kanatal a kakitazaan kenis i tiniay a kenis izaw ku cacay nataan a niyazu'(śú¨ťĄČŚÖĪ10śĚĎ) Cing-ye a niyazu', An-po a niyazu' Cing-san a niyazu' Ma-l-el a niyazu' Cow-se a niyazu' Say-ciya a niyazu' San-ti-men niyazu' Ta-se a niyazu' De-wen a niyazu' Ta-lay a niyazu' Cing-ye a niyazu' An-pu a niyazu' Cing-san a niyazu' a niyazu' Ma-el a niyazu' Kou-se a niyazu' Say-ciya a niyazu' San-ti a niyazu' Ta-se a niyazu' Sandimen tini i nuwamisan Taywan Pin-tung a kuwan, u belaw saamisan nu ťęėťõĄ akuwan Maw-lin a kenis, Liw-kuay a kenis, nuwalian u belaw u Uw-tay a kenis, satipan a belaw u Kaw-su a kenis, Yen-pu a kenis, mitules tu Ne-pu a kenis, Ma-ciya a kenis. katinengan Sandimen kasumamadan a ngangan u "Sin-se-di-mo-el", tungusay u Lukay a binacadan "San-ti-men" kenis a niyazu', Cung-ku a ,Cung-kou a u nu layakay akakitizaan nu malimatay nu layak miatang u layakay akamu misasengiay tu pipangangan "San-cu-maw-se" atu "Sandimen ." Shan-chuan cuyacuy a sangaw Shan-chuan cuyacuy a sangaw/Shanchuan Glass Suspension Bridge Shan-chuan cuyacuy a sangaw tini i Taywan Maw-lin piazihan tu hekal nu kantal a kakitizaan, mitulesay tu Ping-tung akuwan San-ti-men a kenis atu Majia a kenis tu caculilang nu tademaw cuyacuy a sangaw, miawas tu Kaw-ping sauwac adidi'ay cilis Ay-liaw a sauwac, u uzip nu sangaw u masacuyacuyay a sangaw, katanayu' a sangaw 262 kung-ce, laed tu sauwac palalecad tu talakaw sepat bataan izaw ku lima debah, nau satanayaay masacuyacuay a sangaw, katukuh 2017 a mihcaan u Tuing atuse Fu-sing a kakitizaan u baluhay a sacumud nu sauwac cuyavuy a sangaw "katanayu' nu sangaw 303 debah malakuit tuway". Shan-chuan cuyacuy a sangaw/Shanchuan Glass Suspension Bridge u satakus tu Ping-tung akuwan San-ti-men a kenis San-ti a niyazu' atu Majia a kenis Pa-ye a niyazu' tu cuyacuy a sangaw, tunusay masacuyacuyay a sangaw, u sakatuuday pitubian tu tademaw cacay lasubu, Liu-li-cu a sakahini tu pipazeng nu Paiwan a binacadan a Yi-su-ciya ci Sa-ku-liw-pa-wa-wa-lung mibihekacan a misanga', u uzip nu sangaw tusaay a takinilan izaw kunipazeng tu tulu bataan izaw ku tusa a paya' tu kungku, nusakamu 32 masazumaay a kungku nu niyazu', cuyacuy a sangaw i sacumut atu katukuhan patizeng tu Ma-say-ke yi-su-zuo-pin atu tabakiay a ba'tu kunipazeng tu yi-su. uzip tu sangaw tusa a takinilan pahezek tu pitanam katukuh tatengaay tu amiculul a demiadan micunus tu mipazeng tu 1,664 ku Liu-li-cu. malumanay a Fa-wan a niyazu' na u Paiwanay tu ,Rukai a binacadan u lalangawan a tuas ulalekalan a lala' nu tuas, malumanay a Fa-wan u talakaw pakala tu 800 debah, ba'tuay aluma' micangday tu butu' amipatizeng atu nu ayawan a buyu' tu Se-lu, Kaw-yan atu kapahay aucya niyazu' silaed tu ai-liau nutimulan a sauwac, ilabu ku kakitizaan nu Paiwan a binacadan a kakawsan a buyu' "Ta-uw a buyu'", kasilut nu Paiwan a binacadan ba'tuay a luma' masupet u masakapahay malisimed u mahiniay nusuayaway tu butu' micapiay tu nanum, u satalakaway a maazih ku kakitizaan a lala' pawapen tu kasumamadanay tu Fa-wan a tademaw lihalay kunikauzip, uyza sa amitena' tu miubiay tu kapahay a ucya, i saayaway a mihcaan u Fa-wan niyazu' a tademaw katukuh tu cacay lasubu kayadah ku luma', u pikuwanay nu Lipun a ziday Lipun a tademaw napacici tu Se-lu atu Kaw-yan tusaay niyazu'an a tademaw, mabulaw tayza i Fa-wan, Taywan napatizang hawsa ku-min-cen-bu pasilut aca tu tuluay niyazu' a tademaw mabulaw ku niyazu' tayza i ayzaay Pa-yia, Majia atu Fa-wan a niyazu', nauyaanan u Fa-wan a niyazu' pasumad han ku ngangan u malumanay Fa-wan.
S.PHON: sandim…ôn sandim…ôn a sakuwan ku piŇčtuŇč. kumud nu kar~…ĺ…ôsakan, ***.* km*. (kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu r~…ĺinpanti **.** km*, kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu pawr~…ĺiwti **.** km*), u kasabinawr~…ĺan, *,*** ku tad…ômaw. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° sa, *,*** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. ir~…ĺabu nu kasanijazu Ē~ ° nu sijaŇč sa, *,*** ku iŇč ¶umin a tad…ômaw. u kasabinawr~…ĺan, pakar~…ĺatu **%(paiwan, *ukai) ku kasabinawr~…ĺan. u paiwan atu *ukai ku sakar~…ĺanijazu Ē~ °. nikasakuwakuwan sandim…ôn mar~…ĺa ** a ¶uw…ôn atu ** ku nijazu Ē~ °. kina ** a nijazu Ē~ °sa, timur , tja*atja*aŇč , *ar~…ĺjur~…ĺu , paridrajan , sagaran , tar~…ĺamakau , ¶a*ak , djin…ôr~…ĺj…ôpan , tjair~…ĺjakiŇč , kiŇčdar~…ĺruwan…ô , sar~…ĺar~…ĺau tur~…ĺuaj nu k…ônis a tad…ômaw mar~…ĺimat ńßaj nikatukuńß ajza nu sandim…ôn a k…ônis, nisasur~…ĺitaan sakajsasaŇčaan tu kar~…ĺ ¶ar~…ĺa…ô ¶aj nuzazan a kasaupuaan nu nijazu Ē~ °aj, ¶ija a k…ônis. katin…ôŇčan sandim…ôn kasumamadan a ŇčaŇčan u "sin-s…ô-di-mo-…ôr~…ĺ", tuŇčusaj u r~…ĺukaj a bina ¶adan "san-ti-m…ôn" k…ônis a nijazu Ē~ °, ¶uŇč-ku a , ¶uŇč-kou a u nu r~…ĺajakaj akakitizaan nu mar~…ĺimataj nu r~…ĺajak miataŇč u r~…ĺajakaj akamu misas…ôŇčiaj tu pipaŇčaŇčan "san- ¶u-maw-s…ô" atu "sandim…ôn ." sńßan- ¶ńßuan ¶uja ¶uj a saŇčaw sńßan- ¶ńßuan ¶uja ¶uj a saŇčaw/sńßan ¶ńßuan gr~…ĺass susp…ônsion bridg…ô sńßan- ¶ńßuan ¶uja ¶uj a saŇčaw tini i tajwan maw-r~…ĺin piazińßan tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu kantar~…ĺ a kakitizaan, mitur~…ĺ…ôsaj tu piŇč-tuŇč akuwan san-ti-m…ôn a k…ônis atu majia a k…ônis tu ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaŇč nu tad…ômaw ¶uja ¶uj a saŇčaw, miawas tu kaw-piŇč sauwa ¶ adidi Ē~ °aj ¶ir~…ĺis aj-r~…ĺiaw a sauwa ¶, u uzip nu saŇčaw u masa ¶uja ¶ujaj a saŇčaw, katanaju Ē~ ° a saŇčaw *** kuŇč- ¶…ô, r~…ĺa…ôd tu sauwa ¶ par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu tar~…ĺakaw s…ôpat bataan izaw ku r~…ĺima d…ôbańß, nau satanajaaj masa ¶uja ¶uaj a saŇčaw, katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan u tuiŇč atus…ô fu-siŇč a kakitizaan u bar~…ĺuńßaj a sa ¶umud nu sauwa ¶ ¶uja*uj a saŇčaw "katanaju Ē~ ° nu saŇčaw *** d…ôbańß mar~…ĺakuit tuwaj". sńßan- ¶ńßuan ¶uja ¶uj a saŇčaw/sńßan ¶ńßuan gr~…ĺass susp…ônsion bridg…ô u satakus tu piŇč-tuŇč akuwan san-ti-m…ôn a k…ônis san-ti a nijazu Ē~ ° atu majia a k…ônis pa-j…ô a nijazu Ē~ ° tu ¶uja ¶uj a saŇčaw, tunusaj masa ¶uja ¶ujaj a saŇčaw, u sakatuudaj pitubian tu tad…ômaw ¶a ¶aj r~…ĺasubu, r~…ĺiu-r~…ĺi- ¶u a sakańßini tu pipaz…ôŇč nu paiwan a bina ¶adan a ji-su- ¶ija ¶i sa-ku-r~…ĺiw-pa-wa-wa-r~…ĺuŇč mibińß…ôka ¶an a misaŇča Ē~ °, u uzip nu saŇčaw tusaaj a takinir~…ĺan izaw kunipaz…ôŇč tu tur~…ĺu bataan izaw ku tusa a paja Ē~ ° tu kuŇčku, nusakamu ** masazumaaj a kuŇčku nu nijazu Ē~ °, ¶uja ¶uj a saŇčaw i sa ¶umut atu katukuńßan patiz…ôŇč tu ma-saj-k…ô ji-su-zuo-pin atu tabakiaj a ba Ē~ °tu kunipaz…ôŇč tu ji-su. uzip tu saŇčaw tusa a takinir~…ĺan pańß…ôz…ôk tu pitanam katukuńß tat…ôŇčaaj tu ami ¶ur~…ĺur~…ĺ a d…ômiadan mi ¶unus tu mipaz…ôŇč tu *,*** ku r~…ĺiu-r~…ĺi- ¶u. mar~…ĺumanaj a fa-wan a nijazu Ē~ ° na u paiwanaj tu ,*ukai a bina ¶adan u r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a tuas ur~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° nu tuas, mar~…ĺumanaj a fa-wan u tar~…ĺakaw pakar~…ĺa tu *** d…ôbańß, ba Ē~ °tuaj ar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° mi ¶aŇčdaj tu butu Ē~ ° amipatiz…ôŇč atu nu ajawan a buju Ē~ ° tu s…ô-r~…ĺu, kaw-jan atu kapańßaj au ¶ja nijazu Ē~ ° sir~…ĺa…ôd tu ai-r~…ĺiau nutimur~…ĺan a sauwa ¶, ir~…ĺabu ku kakitizaan nu paiwan a bina ¶adan a kakawsan a buju Ē~ ° "ta-uw a buju Ē~ °", kasir~…ĺut nu paiwan a bina ¶adan ba Ē~ °tuaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° masup…ôt u masakapańßaj mar~…ĺisim…ôd u mańßiniaj nusuajawaj tu butu Ē~ ° mi ¶apiaj tu nanum, u satar~…ĺakawaj a maazińß ku kakitizaan a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° pawap…ôn tu kasumamadanaj tu fa-wan a tad…ômaw r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj kunikauzip, ujza sa amit…ôna Ē~ ° tu miubiaj tu kapańßaj a u ¶ja, i saajawaj a mińß ¶aan u fa-wan nijazu Ē~ ° a tad…ômaw katukuńß tu ¶a ¶aj r~…ĺasubu kajadańß ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, u pikuwanaj nu r~…ĺipun a zidaj r~…ĺipun a tad…ômaw napa ¶i ¶i tu s…ô-r~…ĺu atu kaw-jan tusaaj nijazu Ē~ °an a tad…ômaw, mabur~…ĺaw tajza i fa-wan, tajwan napatizaŇč ńßawsa ku-min- ¶…ôn-bu pasir~…ĺut a ¶a tu tur~…ĺuaj nijazu Ē~ ° a tad…ômaw mabur~…ĺaw ku nijazu Ē~ ° tajza i ajzaaj pa-jia, majia atu fa-wan a nijazu Ē~ °, naujaanan u fa-wan a nijazu Ē~ ° pasumad ńßan ku ŇčaŇčan u mar~…ĺumanaj fa-wan.
S.FORM: Sandimen Sandimen a sakuwan ku Pingtung. kumud nu kalesakan, 185.9 km¬≤. (kalesakan nu linpanti 94.02 km¬≤, kalesakan nu pawliwti 85.25 km¬≤), u kasabinawlan, 7,698 ku tademaw. u kasalumaluma' sa, 2,296 ku luma'. ilabu nu kasaniyazu' nu siyang sa, 7,320 ku ingcumin a tademaw. u kasabinawlan, Pakalatu 95%(Paiwan, Rukai) ku kasabinawlan. u Paiwan atu Rukai ku sakalaniyazu'. nikasakuwakuwan Sandimen mala 10 a cuwen atu 12 ku niyazu'. kina 12 a niyazu'sa, Timur , Tjavatjavang , Valjulu , Paridrayan , Sagaran , Talamakau , Cavak , Djineljepan , Tjailjaking , Kingdalruwane , Tjukuvulj , Tjusepayuan . Sandimen (Paiwan a binacadan a kamu, Timur)i tini i Taywan nuwamisan nu Ping-tung-siang, nuwamisan nu Kaw-sing-se Maw-lin-cuy, Liw-kuay-cuy, nuwalian macapi i Wu-tay-siang, satip macapi u Kaw-su-siang, Yan-pu-siang, nutimulan macapi i Ne-pu-siang, Ma-ciy-siang. u ahebal ku lala' makala tu 196 ping-bang-kung-li, nipasilut tu ngangan i Ping-tung-siang u sakatulu nu tabakiay, uyni dada'Se-ce-siang, U'-tay-siang, u tademaw pakala' tu 7.7 malebut a tademaw, u kakatuuday nu Ping-tung-siang a tademaw nu binacadan a niyazu'. Sandimen (śéíÁĀ£Ť™ě:Timur) . Sandimen (Paiwan a binacadan a kamu, Timur)i tini i Taywan nuwamisan nu Ping-tung-siang, nuwamisan nu Kaw-sing-se Maw-lin-cuy, Liw-kuay-cuy, nuwalian macapi i Wu-tay-siang, satip macapi u Kaw-su-siang, Yan-pu-siang, nutimulan macapi i Ne-pu-siang, Ma-ciy-siang. u ahebal ku lala' makala tu 196 ping-bang-kung-li, nipasilut tu ngangan i Ping-tung-siang u sakatulu nu tabakiay, uyni dada'Se-ce-siang, U'-tay-siang, u tademaw pakala' tu 7.7 malebut a tademaw, u kakatuuday nu Ping-tung-siang a tademaw nu binacadan a niyazu'. Sandimen mala 10 a cuwen atu 12 ku niyazu'. kina 12 a niyazu'sa, Timur , Tjavatjavang , Valjulu , Paridrayan , Sagaran , Talamakau , Cavak , Djineljepan , Tjailjaking , Kingdalruwane , Tjukuvulj , Tjusepayuan . uynian a buyu'a lala' atu enal u kalalikeluhan a kakitizaan, kayadahay ku masaungcuyungcuyay a buyu',hay-pa i 100 katukuh i 2,159 depah, izaw ku Ay-liaw a sauwactalabi i niyazu', śĶĀÁ∂ďťĄČŚĘÉdemiad tungusay u ze-day-ci-bung a demiad, aenengan a binawlan u Paiwan a binacadan u kahenulan,u zumaay a Paiwan a binacadan, mahiza u Sin-ye a niyazu', ayzaay a mihcaan pakala tu sakapahay aidangan a kakitizaan, patayza i Maw-lin a kanatalay a idangan. Laylay Sandimen ,śļźŤá™śéíÁĀ£Ť™ě"timur", (Suann-tńď-mnŐāg).1935ŚĻī,śó•śú¨ŚįáśéíÁĀ£śóŹTimur,Talavatsal,Salalau ". Sandimen , lalengawan/lalekalan namakayni i Paiwan a kamu,"timur" malinat tayni miatang ku layakay nu tayniay a Hulan nu lalayay tunisasengiay a ngiha' kyu palu nu buyu'ay a kiwmah a banuh tu San-ti-men, nu ayaza i Taywan layakay a kamu masakamu tu San-ti-men "Suann-tńď-mnŐāg" 1935 a mihca i kaLipunan u Paywan a binacadan tu Timur, Talavatsal, Salalau tuluay nu kenis a tademaw malimat hay nikatukuh ayza nu Sandimen a kenis, nisasulitaan sakaysasangaan tu kalcalaecay nuzazan a kasaupuaan nu niyazu'ay, nanutawya nu Takaw a kenis atu Pingtungay a kenis nipikuwan, panganga han sa "„āĶ„É≥„ÉÜ„ā£„ÉĘ„É≥". nazikuzan nu Kang-hu tu sayaway misumad tu Ta-kawan a kenis nu Sandimen a nikasu u ouwan malecabay a kenis, 1947 amihcaan masumat u Sandimen a kenis, 1950 a mihcaan masumat aca tu baluhayay nu Ping-tung a kenis, 1992 a mihcaan waluay a bulad hanika ayza kinangangan. mikawaway tu kawaw nu kanatal a kakitazaan kenis i tiniay a kenis izaw ku cacay nataan a niyazu'(śú¨ťĄČŚÖĪ10śĚĎ) Cing-ye a niyazu', An-po a niyazu' Cing-san a niyazu' Ma-l-el a niyazu' Cow-se a niyazu' Say-ciya a niyazu' San-ti-men niyazu' Ta-se a niyazu' De-wen a niyazu' Ta-lay a niyazu' Cing-ye a niyazu' An-pu a niyazu' Cing-san a niyazu' a niyazu' Ma-el a niyazu' Kou-se a niyazu' Say-ciya a niyazu' San-ti a niyazu' Ta-se a niyazu' Sandimen tini i nuwamisan Taywan Pin-tung a kuwan, u belaw saamisan nu ťęėťõĄ akuwan Maw-lin a kenis, Liw-kuay a kenis, nuwalian u belaw u Uw-tay a kenis, satipan a belaw u Kaw-su a kenis, Yen-pu a kenis, mitules tu Ne-pu a kenis, Ma-ciya a kenis. katinengan Sandimen kasumamadan a ngangan u "Sin-se-di-mo-el", tungusay u Lukay a binacadan "San-ti-men" kenis a niyazu', Cung-ku a ,Cung-kou a u nu layakay akakitizaan nu malimatay nu layak miatang u layakay akamu misasengiay tu pipangangan "San-cu-maw-se" atu "Sandimen ." Shan-chuan cuyacuy a sangaw Shan-chuan cuyacuy a sangaw/Shanchuan Glass Suspension Bridge Shan-chuan cuyacuy a sangaw tini i Taywan Maw-lin piazihan tu hekal nu kantal a kakitizaan, mitulesay tu Ping-tung akuwan San-ti-men a kenis atu Majia a kenis tu caculilang nu tademaw cuyacuy a sangaw, miawas tu Kaw-ping sauwac adidi'ay cilis Ay-liaw a sauwac, u uzip nu sangaw u masacuyacuyay a sangaw, katanayu' a sangaw 262 kung-ce, laed tu sauwac palalecad tu talakaw sepat bataan izaw ku lima debah, nau satanayaay masacuyacuay a sangaw, katukuh 2017 a mihcaan u Tuing atuse Fu-sing a kakitizaan u baluhay a sacumud nu sauwac cuyavuy a sangaw "katanayu' nu sangaw 303 debah malakuit tuway". Shan-chuan cuyacuy a sangaw/Shanchuan Glass Suspension Bridge u satakus tu Ping-tung akuwan San-ti-men a kenis San-ti a niyazu' atu Majia a kenis Pa-ye a niyazu' tu cuyacuy a sangaw, tunusay masacuyacuyay a sangaw, u sakatuuday pitubian tu tademaw cacay lasubu, Liu-li-cu a sakahini tu pipazeng nu Paiwan a binacadan a Yi-su-ciya ci Sa-ku-liw-pa-wa-wa-lung mibihekacan a misanga', u uzip nu sangaw tusaay a takinilan izaw kunipazeng tu tulu bataan izaw ku tusa a paya' tu kungku, nusakamu 32 masazumaay a kungku nu niyazu', cuyacuy a sangaw i sacumut atu katukuhan patizeng tu Ma-say-ke yi-su-zuo-pin atu tabakiay a ba'tu kunipazeng tu yi-su. uzip tu sangaw tusa a takinilan pahezek tu pitanam katukuh tatengaay tu amiculul a demiadan micunus tu mipazeng tu 1,664 ku Liu-li-cu. malumanay a Fa-wan a niyazu' na u Paiwanay tu ,Rukai a binacadan u lalangawan a tuas ulalekalan a lala' nu tuas, malumanay a Fa-wan u talakaw pakala tu 800 debah, ba'tuay aluma' micangday tu butu' amipatizeng atu nu ayawan a buyu' tu Se-lu, Kaw-yan atu kapahay aucya niyazu' silaed tu ai-liau nutimulan a sauwac, ilabu ku kakitizaan nu Paiwan a binacadan a kakawsan a buyu' "Ta-uw a buyu'", kasilut nu Paiwan a binacadan ba'tuay a luma' masupet u masakapahay malisimed u mahiniay nusuayaway tu butu' micapiay tu nanum, u satalakaway a maazih ku kakitizaan a lala' pawapen tu kasumamadanay tu Fa-wan a tademaw lihalay kunikauzip, uyza sa amitena' tu miubiay tu kapahay a ucya, i saayaway a mihcaan u Fa-wan niyazu' a tademaw katukuh tu cacay lasubu kayadah ku luma', u pikuwanay nu Lipun a ziday Lipun a tademaw napacici tu Se-lu atu Kaw-yan tusaay niyazu'an a tademaw, mabulaw tayza i Fa-wan, Taywan napatizang hawsa ku-min-cen-bu pasilut aca tu tuluay niyazu' a tademaw mabulaw ku niyazu' tayza i ayzaay Pa-yia, Majia atu Fa-wan a niyazu', nauyaanan u Fa-wan a niyazu' pasumad han ku ngangan u malumanay Fa-wan.
S.PHON: sandim…ôn sandim…ôn a sakuwan ku piŇčtuŇč. kumud nu kar~…ĺ…ôsakan, ***.* km*. (kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu r~…ĺinpanti **.** km*, kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu pawr~…ĺiwti **.** km*), u kasabinawr~…ĺan, *,*** ku tad…ômaw. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° sa, *,*** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. ir~…ĺabu nu kasanijazu Ē~ ° nu sijaŇč sa, *,*** ku iŇč ¶umin a tad…ômaw. u kasabinawr~…ĺan, pakar~…ĺatu **%(paiwan, *ukai) ku kasabinawr~…ĺan. u paiwan atu *ukai ku sakar~…ĺanijazu Ē~ °. nikasakuwakuwan sandim…ôn mar~…ĺa ** a ¶uw…ôn atu ** ku nijazu Ē~ °. kina ** a nijazu Ē~ °sa, timur , tja*atja*aŇč , *ar~…ĺjur~…ĺu , paridrajan , sagaran , tar~…ĺamakau , ¶a*ak , djin…ôr~…ĺj…ôpan , tjair~…ĺjakiŇč , kiŇčdar~…ĺruwan…ô , tjuku*ur~…ĺj , tjus…ôpajuan . sandim…ôn (paiwan a bina ¶adan a kamu, timur)i tini i tajwan nuwamisan nu piŇč-tuŇč-siaŇč, nuwamisan nu kaw-siŇč-s…ô maw-r~…ĺin- ¶uj, r~…ĺiw-kuaj- ¶uj, nuwar~…ĺian ma nipasir~…ĺut tu ŇčaŇčan i piŇč-tuŇč-siaŇč u sakatur~…ĺu nu tabakiaj, ujni dada Ē~ °s…ô- ¶…ô-siaŇč, u Ē~ °-taj-siaŇč, u tad…ômaw pakar~…ĺa Ē~ ° tu *.* mar~…ĺ…ôbut a tad…ômaw, u kakatuudaj nu maw-r~…ĺin- ¶uj, r~…ĺiw-kuaj- ¶uj, nuwar~…ĺian ma ¶api i wu-taj-siaŇč, satip ma ¶api u kaw-su-siaŇč, jan-pu-siaŇč, nutimur~…ĺan ma ¶api i n…ô-pu-siaŇč, ma- ¶ij-siaŇč. u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ ku r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° makar~…ĺa tu *** piŇč-baŇč-kuŇč-r~…ĺi, nipasir~…ĺut tu ŇčaŇčan i piŇč-tuŇč-siaŇč u sakatur~…ĺu nu tabakiaj, ujni dada Ē~ °s…ô- ¶…ô-siaŇč, u Ē~ °-taj-siaŇč, u tad…ômaw pakar~…ĺa Ē~ ° tu *.* mar~…ĺ…ôbut a tad…ômaw, u kakatuudaj nu piŇč-tuŇč-siaŇč a tad…ômaw nu bina ¶adan a nijazu Ē~ °. sandim…ôn mar~…ĺa ** a ¶uw…ôn atu ** ku nijazu Ē~ °. kina ** a nijazu Ē~ °sa, timur , tja*atja*aŇč , *ar~…ĺjur~…ĺu , u z…ô-daj- ¶i-buŇč a d…ômiad, a…ôn…ôŇčan a binawr~…ĺan u paiwan a bina ¶adan u kańß…ônur~…ĺan,u zumaaj a paiwan a bina ¶adan, mańßiza u sin-j…ô a nijazu Ē~ °, ajzaaj a mińß ¶aan pakar~…ĺa tu sakapańßaj aidaŇčan a kakitizaan, patajza i maw-r~…ĺin a kanatar~…ĺaj a idaŇčan. r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj sandim…ôn ,*****"timur", (suann-t*-mn*g).*****,******timur,tar~…ĺa*atsar~…ĺ,sar~…ĺar~…ĺau ". sandim…ôn , r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôŇčawan/r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan namakajni i paiwan a kamu,"timur" mar~…ĺinat tajni miataŇč ku r~…ĺajakaj nu tajniaj a ńßur~…ĺan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺajaj tunisas…ôŇčiaj a Ňčińßa Ē~ ° kju par~…ĺu nu buju Ē~ °aj a kiwmańß a banuńß tu san-ti-m…ôn, nu ajaza i tajwan r~…ĺajakaj a kamu masakamu tu san-ti-m…ôn "suann-t*-mn*g" **** a mińß ¶a i kar~…ĺipunan u pajwan a bina ¶adan tu timur, tar~…ĺa*atsar~…ĺ, sar~…ĺar~…ĺau tur~…ĺuaj nu k…ônis a tad…ômaw mar~…ĺimat ńßaj nikatukuńß ajza nu sandim…ôn a k…ônis, nisasur~…ĺitaan sakajsasaŇčaan tu kar~…ĺ ¶ar~…ĺa…ô ¶aj nuzazan a kasaupuaan nu nijazu Ē~ °aj, nanutawja nu takaw a k…ônis atu piŇčtuŇčaj a k…ônis nipikuwan, paŇčaŇča ńßan sa "******". nazikuzan nu kaŇč-ńßu tu sajawaj misumad tu ta-kawan a k…ônis nu sandim…ôn a nikasu u ouwan mar~…ĺ…ô ¶abaj a k…ônis, **** amińß ¶aan masumat u sandim…ôn a k…ônis, **** a mińß ¶aan masumat a ¶a tu bar~…ĺuńßajaj nu piŇč-tuŇč a k…ônis, **** a mińß ¶aan war~…ĺuaj a bur~…ĺad ńßanika ajza kinaŇčaŇčan. mikawawaj tu kawaw nu kanatar~…ĺ a kakitazaan k…ônis i tiniaj a k…ônis izaw ku ¶a ¶aj nataan a nijazu Ē~ °(******) ¶iŇč-j…ô a nijazu Ē~ °, an-po a nijazu Ē~ ° ¶iŇč-san a nijazu Ē~ ° ma-r~…ĺ-…ôr~…ĺ a nijazu Ē~ ° Ē~ ° a nijazu Ē~ ° ma-…ôr~…ĺ a nijazu Ē~ ° kou-s…ô a nijazu Ē~ ° saj- ¶ija a nijazu Ē~ ° san-ti a nijazu Ē~ ° ta-s…ô a nijazu Ē~ ° sandim…ôn tini i nuwamisan tajwan pin-tuŇč a kuwan, u b…ôr~…ĺaw saamisan nu ** akuwan maw-r~…ĺin a k…ônis, r~…ĺiw-kuaj a k…ônis, nuwar~…ĺian u b…ôr~…ĺaw u uw-taj a k…ônis, satipan a b…ôr~…ĺaw u kaw-su a k…ônis, j…ôn-pu a k…ônis, mitur~…ĺ…ôs tu n…ô-pu a k…ônis, ma- ¶ija a k…ônis. katin…ôŇčan sandim…ôn kasumamadan a ŇčaŇčan u "sin-s…ô-di-mo-…ôr~…ĺ", tuŇčusaj u r~…ĺukaj a bina ¶adan "san-ti-m…ôn" k…ônis a nijazu Ē~ °, ¶uŇč-ku a , ¶uŇč-kou a u nu r~…ĺajakaj akakitizaan nu mar~…ĺimataj nu r~…ĺajak miataŇč u r~…ĺajakaj akamu misas…ôŇčiaj tu pipaŇčaŇčan "san- ¶u-maw-s…ô" atu "sandim…ôn ." sńßan- ¶ńßuan ¶uja ¶uj a saŇčaw sńßan- ¶ńßuan ¶uja ¶uj a saŇčaw/sńßan ¶ńßuan gr~…ĺass susp…ônsion bridg…ô sńßan- ¶ńßuan ¶uja ¶uj a saŇčaw tini i tajwan maw-r~…ĺin piazińßan tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu kantar~…ĺ a kakitizaan, mitur~…ĺ…ôsaj tu piŇč-tuŇč akuwan san-ti-m…ôn a k…ônis atu majia a k…ônis tu ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaŇč nu tad…ômaw ¶uja ¶uj a saŇčaw, miawas tu kaw-piŇč sauwa ¶ adidi Ē~ °aj ¶ir~…ĺis aj-r~…ĺiaw a sauwa ¶, u uzip nu saŇčaw u masa ¶uja ¶ujaj a saŇčaw, katanaju Ē~ ° a saŇčaw *** kuŇč- ¶…ô, r~…ĺa…ôd tu sauwa ¶ par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu tar~…ĺakaw s…ôpat bataan izaw ku r~…ĺima d…ôbańß, nau satanajaaj masa ¶uja ¶uaj a saŇčaw, katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan u tuiŇč atus…ô fu-siŇč a kakitizaan u bar~…ĺuńßaj a sa ¶umud nu sauwa ¶ ¶uja*uj a saŇčaw "katanaju Ē~ ° nu saŇčaw *** d…ôbańß mar~…ĺakuit tuwaj". sńßan- ¶ńßuan ¶uja ¶uj a saŇčaw/sńßan ¶ńßuan gr~…ĺass susp…ônsion bridg…ô u satakus tu piŇč-tuŇč akuwan san-ti-m…ôn a k…ônis san-ti a nijazu Ē~ ° atu majia a k…ônis pa-j…ô a nijazu Ē~ ° tu ¶uja ¶uj a saŇčaw, tunusaj masa ¶uja ¶ujaj a saŇčaw, u sakatuudaj pitubian tu tad…ômaw ¶a ¶aj r~…ĺasubu, r~…ĺiu-r~…ĺi- ¶u a sakańßini tu pipaz…ôŇč nu paiwan a bina ¶adan a ji-su- ¶ija ¶i sa-ku-r~…ĺiw-pa-wa-wa-r~…ĺuŇč mibińß…ôka ¶an a misaŇča Ē~ °, u uzip nu saŇčaw tusaaj a takinir~…ĺan izaw kunipaz…ôŇč tu tur~…ĺu bataan izaw ku tusa a paja Ē~ ° tu kuŇčku, nusakamu ** masazumaaj a kuŇčku nu nijazu Ē~ °, ¶uja ¶uj a saŇčaw i sa ¶umut atu katukuńßan patiz…ôŇč tu ma-saj-k…ô ji-su-zuo-pin atu tabakiaj a ba Ē~ °tu kunipaz…ôŇč tu ji-su. uzip tu saŇčaw tusa a takinir~…ĺan pańß…ôz…ôk tu pitanam katukuńß tat…ôŇčaaj tu ami ¶ur~…ĺur~…ĺ a d…ômiadan mi ¶unus tu mipaz…ôŇč tu *,*** ku r~…ĺiu-r~…ĺi- ¶u. mar~…ĺumanaj a fa-wan a nijazu Ē~ ° na u paiwanaj tu ,*ukai a bina ¶adan u r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a tuas ur~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° nu tuas, mar~…ĺumanaj a fa-wan u tar~…ĺakaw pakar~…ĺa tu *** d…ôbańß, ba Ē~ °tuaj ar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° mi ¶aŇčdaj tu butu Ē~ ° amipatiz…ôŇč atu nu ajawan a buju Ē~ ° tu s…ô-r~…ĺu, kaw-jan atu kapańßaj au ¶ja nijazu Ē~ ° sir~…ĺa…ôd tu ai-r~…ĺiau nutimur~…ĺan a sauwa ¶, ir~…ĺabu ku kakitizaan nu paiwan a bina ¶adan a kakawsan a buju Ē~ ° "ta-uw a buju Ē~ °", kasir~…ĺut nu paiwan a bina ¶adan ba Ē~ °tuaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° masup…ôt u masakapańßaj mar~…ĺisim…ôd u mańßiniaj nusuajawaj tu butu Ē~ ° mi ¶apiaj tu nanum, u satar~…ĺakawaj a maazińß ku kakitizaan a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° pawap…ôn tu kasumamadanaj tu fa-wan a tad…ômaw r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj kunikauzip, ujza sa amit…ôna Ē~ ° tu miubiaj tu kapańßaj a u ¶ja, i saajawaj a mińß ¶aan u fa-wan nijazu Ē~ ° a tad…ômaw katukuńß tu ¶a ¶aj r~…ĺasubu kajadańß ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, u pikuwanaj nu r~…ĺipun a zidaj r~…ĺipun a tad…ômaw napa ¶i ¶i tu s…ô-r~…ĺu atu kaw-jan tusaaj nijazu Ē~ °an a tad…ômaw, mabur~…ĺaw tajza i fa-wan, tajwan napatizaŇč ńßawsa ku-min- ¶…ôn-bu pasir~…ĺut a ¶a tu tur~…ĺuaj nijazu Ē~ ° a tad…ômaw mabur~…ĺaw ku nijazu Ē~ ° tajza i ajzaaj pa-jia, majia atu fa-wan a nijazu Ē~ °, naujaanan u fa-wan a nijazu Ē~ ° pasumad ńßan ku ŇčaŇčan u mar~…ĺumanaj fa-wan.
